title: psychotria dolichantha
intro: Psychotria dolichantha is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee family, and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria dolichantha include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Psychotria dolichantha are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
